title: Taxi Taxi Song Lyrics Sakkarakatti
stanzas:
Taxi Taxi Song Lyrics Sakkarakatti
#ARRahman #BennyDayal #Blaaze

hahaa heyhey..
nanba nee oru ilavasa taxi
nanba nee oru ilavasa taxi

once upon a time
when we were riding real easy
only we used
our new maruthi
look up on the sides
when a citi girl pass by
bale bale you say
bye bye bye

se bale bale
se hole hole
se oye oye
shaavaa

rasi rasi
nanban kidaithal
yellam oasi
taxi taxi
nanba nee oru
ilavasa taxi (2)

nee nee nee nee illayel
naan naan naan engu povathu
thoal saaya thoal illayel
en vaazhkai ennavathu

rasi rasi
nanban kidaithal
yellam oasi
taxi taxi
nanba nee oru
ilavasa taxi

oolaa oolaa
nanban kidaithal
yellam oasi
oolaa oolaa
yosi yosi..

we’ve gonna a smile coz
we have a journey
dinner with a lady
in a red saree
shout out loud,
say you’re so sweet

we’ve gonna a smile
coz we have a journey
dinner with a lady
in a red sareeyaa..
oolaa oolaa

en thavarai nee maraithaai
enakai archanai vaanginaai
un thoalgal yaeniyai poal
yaeri midithen thanginaai

ezhum poathu kai thandhu
azhum poathu kadan thandhu
ilaipaara madi thandhu
enkena vaazhvathu nee thaane

rasi rasi nanban
kidaithal yellam osi
taxi taxi nanba
nee oru ilavasa taxi

thillaanaa thillaanaa
thimiru pudicha thillaanaa…
anbaanaa anbaanaa
adangamaataen hero naan

kalla thanam theriyaathu
kaadhaliye kidaiyaathu

kanjathanam theriyaadhu
kanjaave kidayaadhu
nalla pazham kidayaadhu
gnana pazham kidayaadhu
en uyir nanban nee thaane

rasi rasi nanban
kidaithal yellam osi
taxi taxi nanba
nee oru ilavasa taxi

nee nee nee nee illayel
naan naan naan engu povathu
thoal saaya thoal illayel
en vaazhkai ennavathu
ennavathu ennavathu

taxi taxi..
awesome taxi…
taxi taxi…
raasi raasi…
”rap” ae jaasthi…

taxi taxi…
taxi taxi…
make the wave…
make the sound…

taxi taxi…
kumbakumengum city city
thinam thinam
engal tire kaatchi

group boys naangal
king of the streets
live people gather
every body follow me…

look up in the side
when ya see u when u pass by
friend thavira friends thavira
stay with me all at the time
going through the streets
thavira they must they must ask why
we’ll be so happy as
we know that we’are nice guy

seo.title: Taxi Taxi Song Lyrics Sakkarakatti
seo.description: Full Taxi Taxi songs lyrics, Sakkarakatti Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Blaaze, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Benny Dayal, Blaaze.
seo.keywords: Blaaze, Na Muthukumar, Sakkarakatti, AR Rahman, Benny Dayal, Blaaze, Taxi Taxi full lyrics, Sakkarakatti songs lyrics, Taxi Taxi lyrics snippets, Taxi Taxi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Taxi Taxi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song captures the carefree and fun moments of youth, particularly during taxi rides and interactions with friends.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Sakkarakatti, the song reflects the light-hearted and adventurous spirit of the characters as they navigate their youthful experiences.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Benny Dayal and Blaaze, with music composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

Taxi Taxi was released on September 26, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Taxi Taxi from Sakkarakatti is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the joy of youthful adventures. It portrays carefree moments spent with friends, particularly during taxi rides, filled with laughter and excitement. The energetic collaboration between Benny Dayal and Blaaze, combined with AR Rahman's catchy music, evokes a sense of happiness and nostalgia. This song is perfect for celebrations and parties, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Taxi Taxi from Sakkarakatti is a vibrant celebration of youth and fun, featuring the dynamic voices of Benny Dayal and Blaaze. With AR Rahman's infectious beats, this song captures the essence of carefree rides and joyful moments. Get ready to groove to the catchy rhythms that make every taxi ride feel like an adventure!
stanzaMeanings: Haha hey hey.. buddy, you are a cool taxi, buddy, you are a cool taxi.
Once upon a time when we were riding easily, we only used our new Maruthi. Look to the sides when a city girl passes by, you say bye bye bye.
So, bale bale, so hole hole, so oye oye, shaavaa.
When a lucky friend appears, everything is good. Taxi taxi, buddy, you are a cool taxi (2).
If you are not there, where will I go? If you are not there, my life is nothing.
When a lucky friend appears, everything is good. Taxi taxi, buddy, you are a cool taxi.
Oolaa oolaa, when a friend appears, everything is good. Oolaa oolaa, yosi yosi..
We have a smile because we have a dinner journey with a lady in a red saree. Shout out loud, say you’re so sweet.
We have a smile because we have a dinner journey with a lady in a red saree..
Oolaa oolaa
You hid my mistake, you took my offering. Your legs are like a rising wave, I am caught in it.
With a raised hand, I give, with a lowered hand, I take. You are the one who gives me life.
When a lucky friend appears, everything is good. Taxi taxi, buddy, you are a cool taxi.
Thillaanaa thillaanaa, I caught the spark, thillaanaa… I am a hero, I won’t stop loving.
The thief's nature is unknown, my beloved is not available.
The thief's nature is unknown, my dear, is not available. Good fruit is not available, wisdom fruit is not available, you are my life, buddy.
When a lucky friend appears, everything is good. Taxi taxi, buddy, you are a cool taxi.
If you are not there, where will I go? If you are not there, my life is nothing, nothing, nothing.
Taxi taxi.. awesome taxi… taxi taxi… lucky lucky… “rap” is more…
Taxi taxi… taxi taxi… make the wave… make the sound…
Taxi taxi… in the city, every day, our tires are rolling.
Group boys, we are the kings of the streets. Live people gather, everybody follow me…
Look to the side when you see me passing by, friend. Stay with me all the time while going through the streets. They must ask why we are so happy because we know we are nice guys.
